introduction: The IBM License Metric Tool helps you maintain an inventory of the Processor Value Unit (PVU) based software deployed for your Full Capacity or Virtualization (Sub-) Capacity environment, and measures the PVU licenses required by software Product. It is intended to help you manage your IBM software licensing requirements, and help you maintain an audit ready posture.
service description:
Standard services
The IBM License Metric Tool service provides a platform to:
Reporting
Monthly creation of a report that will be emailed to the service delivery manager. The report provides information about computers in your infrastructure and information about the computer health:
